headline: Yael Grauer
image_alt_text: A social card featuring verified Hush Line user Yael Grauer, their bio, their tip line URL, and a QR code that links to the same URL.

social.bluesky:
🤩 Verified Member Highlight!

Yael Grauer is an investigative tech reporter covering privacy, security, hacking, and mass surveillance. She works at Consumer Reports managing Security Planner, a digital security guide.

Send Yael a tip: https://tips.hushline.app/to/yaelwrites
